query:
-- OZ/TAD enrichment fields on deals table
ALTER TABLE deals 
  ADD COLUMN opportunity_zone BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN oz_tract_id VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN tad_district VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN oz_potential_gain DECIMAL(15,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN event_proximity_miles DECIMAL(5,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN event_revenue_low INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN event_revenue_high INT NULL;

-- Commercial assets table (foundation for Sprint 5 Scout agent)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS commercial_assets (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  address VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  city VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  state VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  zip VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  property_type ENUM('office','industrial','retail','mixed_use','land','warehouse','flex') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'retail',
  square_footage INT NULL,
  asking_price DECIMAL(15,2) NULL,
  cap_rate DECIMAL(5,3) NULL,
  noi DECIMAL(15,2) NULL,
  lease_type ENUM('nnn','gross','modified_gross','vacant') NULL,
  zoning VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  opportunity_zone BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  oz_tract_id VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  tad_district VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  distance_to_venue DECIMAL(5,2) NULL,
  event_revenue_low INT NULL,
  event_revenue_high INT NULL,
  source VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  source_url TEXT NULL,
  ai_score DECIMAL(4,3) NULL,
  ai_analysis TEXT NULL,
  status ENUM('new','reviewing','qualified','rejected','acquired') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_commercial_name_source (name, source)
);

-- Macro signals table (foundation for Sprint 6 Sentinel agent)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS macro_signals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  signal_type ENUM('institutional','government','seasonal','event','macro_momentum') NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  summary TEXT NOT NULL,
  rory_pitch TEXT NULL,
  impacted_asset_classes JSON NULL,
  recommended_action TEXT NULL,
  confidence_score DECIMAL(4,3) NULL,
  source_url TEXT NULL,
  expires_at BIGINT NULL,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
